extension.description: Apply localized curated phrases to AI thinking prompts on demand.
command.apply.title: ThePilot: Apply curated phrases to AI thinking prompts
command.reset.title: ThePilot: Restore previous AI thinking prompts
config.autoApply.description: Apply the current language's curated phrases to AI thinking prompts automatically on startup. Off by default so startup does not change user settings without opt-in.
